page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-180-lssd is a high-capacity instance from the c3d family, powered by dedicated AMD EPYC 9B14 processors using the x86_64 architecture. It features 180 vCPUs across 90 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The system is equipped with 720 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4 GB of memory per core. Local storage is bundled, consisting of 16 local NVMe SSDs totaling 6432 GB of high-speed storage. No GPUs are included in this configuration.

Benchmark data indicates exceptional multi-core capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core performance, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU scores all ranking in the top 10% tier. Memory performance is highly efficient, showing top-tier write speeds and small-block read bandwidth. The instance also demonstrates strong single-core execution, placing in the top 25% for stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core tests. Cryptographic and vector workloads benefit from hardware-accelerated instruction sets, including AVX-512 and AES.

This instance is optimized for large-scale workloads requiring high resource density and fast local storage access. It excels in database operations, static web serving, and software compilation, all of which register top-tier benchmark results. Additionally, it supports efficient CPU-based LLM inference, particularly for prompt processing and text generation on medium to large models. Given its massive core count and integrated NVMe storage, the instance offers high qualitative cost efficiency for consolidated enterprise workloads and data-intensive applications.
description: The Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-180-lssd is a high-density server featuring 180 vCPUs powered by dedicated AMD EPYC 9B14 processors on the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 720 GB of RAM and 6432 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across 16 drives, with no GPU accelerators. This instance delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance, high memory bandwidth, and exceptional throughput for database operations and web serving. It also supports advanced vector and cryptographic instructions, making it highly capable for CPU-based LLM inference and software compilation. The combination of massive compute resources and high-speed local storage provides excellent resource density for demanding enterprise applications, large-scale databases, and data-intensive processing workloads.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-180-lssd is a high-density server with 180 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 720 GB RAM, and 6432 GB local NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-180-lssd features 180 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 720 GB RAM, and 6432 GB local NVMe SSD storage for high-density workloads.
tagline: A high-density compute and storage platform featuring 180 dedicated x86_64 cores and over six terabytes of local NVMe SSD.
bullet_points: 180 dedicated vCPUs powered by AMD EPYC 9B14 processors
720 GB of system memory providing 4 GB per core
6432 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
Optimized for large-scale databases, web serving, and software compilation
Supports CPU-based LLM inference with AVX-512 acceleration
